title: Ronin
description: With this mod, you can make your own katana and become the best swordsman in the whole Minecraft world.
body:
![Ronin - Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a1ba5a1530964d744f5790d34cedbcec74cacf9.png)


_________________________________________________________________________________________________________

With this mod, you can make your own katana and become the best swordsman in the whole Minecraft world.

The mod is currently only for the **Forge**. Then it will be on the **Fabric**.




This mod is still under development, it is currently in the alpha stage. So you can support me in the upcoming modding by subscribing to me in Modrinth.:)

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

### 📦 **What does this mod add?**

This mod adds the creation of new weapons to the world of Minecraft. The **katana** is a long Japanese sword.The Katana has a **faster attack speed** than a regular Minecraft sword, but the **damage is slightly less** than the sword. Also, a jerk is added to the **right mouse button** with a delay of **3 seconds**.

![Creating a Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10594ec4212328aee37a0ba94d3317252ec66645.png)

![Creating a Netherite Katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a5cbe62fd617bc0e7711a72f0c2fbfffe76b682.png)

______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Now there will be a new steel ore underground. Of course, you can't make armor out of it, but you can use it to create a katana. But how?

![Remelting of steel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/082030e73c7f9da98a424b66fe67113422f94ffd.png)

In order to create a katana made of steel, iron, gold and netherite, you need to combine the ingots with the new **tamahagane** metal in a **Smithing Table**.

![Creation of new ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a92ed7c91ce54079cf6cf6a58677dfd6855871f6.png)

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

**Tamahagane** is a Japanese precious steel that has been known since the early Middle Ages.

![Remelting of Tamahagane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23ca927882c515f35e5a0d1abe6d0deae35a1011.png)

It is located underground and looks like **Black sand**. To get **tamahagane**, you need to melt **black sand** in the oven.

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

### 📬 **How do I report mod errors?**

You can report mod errors via my **Ronin mod Discord server**. There is a "❗️-mod-bugs" form on my server, go there and follow the rules for writing a complaint.

____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

### 🤔 **Plans for the future of mod**

I plan to do a lot of customization of katanas and effects/abilities in the future, much like in Demon Slayer. 

And to create katanas with effects/ abilities, add mobs and bosses. 

Also, redo the creation of katanas so that it is more interesting to make them and covers for them.

Also, then I will definitely update the mod for new versions of Minecraft.

_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________

### 🌎 **Translations**

**There are languages in the mod:**

-Russian ☑️

-English ☑️

**In the future:**

-Ukrainian ❌

-Spanish ❌
_______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
